properties.name: clearable
properties.description: Adds a clear button to the select that clears the selected value(s).

properties.name: disabled
properties.description: Sets the element's disabled state. A disabled element will not be included during form submission.

properties.name: fixed-dropdown
properties.description: Sets the position strategy of the dropdown to fixed

properties.name: icon
properties.description: A decorative icon for the element. See the [Vivid Icon Gallery](/icons/icons-gallery/) for available icons and `icon-name`s

properties.name: multiple
properties.description: Sets the element to allow multiple selections

properties.name: open
properties.description: Sets the element's menu to be open

properties.name: placeholder
properties.description: Sets the text to be displayed when no option is selected

properties.name: scale
properties.description: Sets the display size of the input element

properties.name: shape
properties.description: Sets the shape of the select element

events.name: input
events.description: Fired when an option is selected or unselected.

events.name: change
events.description: Fired when an option is selected or unselected.

slots.name: default
slots.description: Default slot meant for Option component to provide the option list

slots.name: helper-text
slots.description: Add HTML content for helper text

slots.name: icon
slots.description: Add an icon to the component.

slots.name: meta
slots.description: Show meta information after the selected option label

slots.name: contextual-help
slots.description: Allows you to add the [Contextual Help](/components/contextual-help/) component to be displayed next to the label.
